verse_text: Then Nebuchadnezzar sent to gather together the high officials, the commanders, the governors, the rulers, and all those in authority, along with all the rulers of the provinces, to come to the dedication of the image King Nebuchadnezzar set up.

links.context: This verse describes a pagan religious procession such as someone like Daniel would daily witness (see [[DAN.3:1]]-7).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
